title: lithocarpus korthalsii
intro: Lithocarpus korthalsii, also known as the Korthals' tanoak, is a species of evergreen tree in the beech family that is native to Indonesia. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant activities. The leaves and bark of Lithocarpus korthalsii have been found to have various health benefits, including reducing fever, alleviating pain, and treating respiratory infections. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used in teas, infusions, and tinctures to support immune function and promote overall well-being.
